name: Voice Satellite
description: Local voice assistant satellites via Home Assistant Wyoming protocol. Routes voice transcripts to the agent session for unified context across voice, Telegram, and Discord.

bridgePort.description: HTTP port for the OpenAI-compatible bridge endpoint

ownerChatId.description: Telegram chat ID of the owner (for unified session routing)

satellites.description: Registered voice satellites keyed by satellite ID

room.description: Room where the satellite is located

haEntityId.description: Home Assistant entity ID for this satellite

maxVoiceWords.description: Responses longer than this redirect details to Telegram

alwaysEchoToTelegram.description: Always send a copy to Telegram

archiveLongResponses.description: Write long responses to Wiki.js Archives
